intended_use_full: Saige-Density is intended for use with compatible full-field digital mammography (FFDM) and digital breast tomosynthesis (DBT) systems. Saige-Density provides an ACR BI-RADS Atlas 5th Edition breast density category to aid interpreting physicians in the assessment of breast tissue composition. Saige-Density produces adjunctive information. It is not a diagnostic aid.
